patch.value: As an integrator, I can build a complete custom PM tool for my project using only the public pm SDK

Agent-story capability statement for the SDK-first epic pm-usfg. Delivered when every CLI capability is reachable programmatically: an SDK-only consumer performs the full item lifecycle, queries, annotations, governance checks, and schema/profile customization without invoking the pm binary. Duplicate check: existing agent stories cover extension authoring, not SDK-only PM-tool assembly.

Exemplar package builds a minimal custom PM CLI importing only @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk; it exercises create/update/close/claim, list/search/context, comments/notes/files/deps, validate/health, and a schema customization end-to-end in its linked tests; no src/core deep imports anywhere in the exemplar
